vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.description: Center Body Pod for a long-range surveillance UAV
Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Wildfire monitoring, heat-resistant belly, real-time video relay, FLIR bay
Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear
Actuation subsystem: Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)

risk.desc: Potential access blockage due to monolithic design.
risk.mit: Design with modular access panels and clear inspection paths.

risk.desc: Weak interface at wing spar attachment due to insufficient material.
risk.mit: Increase material thickness at critical interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of tolerance mismatch during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerance control and verification steps.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect surface finish quality.
risk.mit: Optimize build parameters and post-processing steps.

risk.desc: Overclaiming of structural integrity not supported by evidence.
risk.mit: Conduct additional analysis and testing to validate claims.

physics_paths.path: from wing spar to pod frame
physics_paths.description: transmits wing bending loads to pod frame

physics_paths.path: cooling air from motor pylon to pod

allows access to equipment bay for maintenance
routes power and data cables between motor and pod

integration_opportunities.description: bolt holes for wing spar attachment
harness routing path for motor pylon

manufacturing_strategy.support: build direction from bottom to top
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection for surface finish and alignment

verification_focus.description: verify fit and clearance with wing spar
verify structural integrity under motor loads
verify door opens and closes freely
verify air flow through cooling inlet

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between CFRP spar and EPP foam core.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion coefficient analysis and adjust design as necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load path continuity if ribs or carry-through are not properly integrated.
risk.mit: Ensure all ribs and carry-through features are designed to maintain continuous load path.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit and function due to tolerance stack-up errors.
risk.mit: Conduct detailed tolerance stack-up analysis and adjust as necessary.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of spar_socket and skin_socket due to manufacturing tolerances
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerance control during manufacturing and perform post-manufacture alignment checks

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion causing stress on wing ribs during extreme temperature changes
risk.mit: Use materials with low thermal expansion coefficients and include thermal expansion joints in design

risk.desc: Potential fatigue failure at control surface cutout due to repetitive motion
risk.mit: Increase material thickness at control surface cutout and perform fatigue testing

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through service access panel seals
risk.mit: Use high-quality seals and perform water-tightness testing

risk.desc: Potential interference between harness routing path and adjacent components
risk.mit: Optimize harness routing path and ensure sufficient clearance between components

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)

physics_paths.path: Cooling air flows from wing leading edge through motor_pod inlet, across motor, and out rear propeller path.
Motor drives propeller, generating thrust along +1deg down vector.
Propeller folds for storage, motor and propeller can be accessed through rear access cut.
Harness passes through harness_path for motor power and control signals.

verification_focus.description: Check motor mount for correct shape, fit, and finish.
Verify bolt circle dimensions and spacing.
Test cooling inlet for proper airflow.
Ensure propeller is aligned with motor shaft.
Inspect motor pod for cosmetic defects.
Check fastener pattern for proper placement and tightness.
Test harness path for proper routing and clearance.

risk.mit: Implement additional cooling fins and optimize airflow for better heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of signal interference between GPS and telemetry boards.
risk.mit: Ensure proper signal separation and shielding between the boards.

risk.desc: Risk of cable strain due to tight routing.
risk.mit: Review cable routing and ensure strain relief features are included.

risk.mit: Define primary datum features and ensure clear assembly sequences.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to insufficient fastener locking evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion coefficients to design joint clearances and allow for movement.

risk.desc: Risk of harness damage due to lack of strain relief at cable exits.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features at all cable exits and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of access panel misalignment due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances for access panel interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of connector mis-mating due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are keyable or labeled to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly sequence errors due to complex fastener patterns.
risk.mit: Develop clear assembly instructions and train personnel on proper sequence.
